author: Claude
description: Returns sales/transaction data grouped by 4 day-part time buckets across a date range and sites with YoY comparison. Supports multi-site reporting with tenant filtering handled by OutSystems application layer. Parent query for hourly drill-down view.

parameters.name: @SiteIds
parameters.description: Comma-separated list of Site IDs. OutSystems pre-filters based on tenant and active status.

parameters.name: @SelectedView
parameters.description: Metric to display: D=Dollar Sales, G=Guest Count, A=Average Check

output_columns.name: DayPartLabel
output_columns.description: Day part name (Total, Overnight, Breakfast, Day, Night)

output_columns.name: PercentTotal
output_columns.description: Percentage of that site's daily total (0 for Average view)

tables_used.purpose: Sales transaction data with DateTime and metrics
Site master data (joined on Site.Id = SalesFact.SiteId)

key_features: Tenant filtering handled by OutSystems application layer
Active/inactive filtering handled by OutSystems application layer
STRING_SPLIT() to parse site list in SQL
4 day-part time buckets (Overnight, Breakfast, Day, Night)
Window functions for % calculations (partitioned by site)
Numbers CTE for large date ranges
Clean separation: Application filters, SQL aggregates

performance.expected_runtime: 1-8 seconds (varies by site count and date range)
performance.single_site: < 1 second for 7-day range, 1-2 seconds for 30-day range
performance.multi_site: 1-3 seconds for 10 sites (7-day), 3-8 seconds for 50 sites (7-day)
techniques: SiteList CTE with STRING_SPLIT() for comma-separated parsing
IN clause for fast site filtering
Application-layer tenant filtering (faster than SQL logic)
Window functions instead of joins (partitioned by site)

related_queries.name: Product Sales By Day Part Hourly
Product Sales By POS Type Hourly

output_structure.sort_order: Date ASC, SiteName ASC, SortOrder ASC

change_log.change: Initial creation - parent query setup from user-provided code
change_log.author: Claude

change_log.change: Added multi-site support - @SiteId now nullable (NULL = all sites), added @ActiveOnly parameter, added SiteName column, Site table join, SiteFilter CTE, scaffold expanded to Date x DayPart x Site, % calculations partitioned by site
change_log.author: Claude

change_log.change: REFACTORED to @SiteIds approach - Removed @SiteId (nullable) and @ActiveOnly parameters, added @SiteIds (NVARCHAR(MAX)) for comma-separated list, removed SiteFilter CTE, added SiteList CTE with STRING_SPLIT(), tenant/active filtering moved to OutSystems application layer for cleaner separation and better performance
change_log.author: Claude
